verses.text: En un, ni khat ni ciangin thuman takin kumpi khat in hong uk ding a, uliante in thutang tawh hong uk ding uh hi
Amaute pen huihpi panin belhna, guahpi panin bukna bang ding uh hi. Sehnel gamsungah a luang tui bang ding uh a, nisa gamsungah a om suangpi liim bang ding uh hi
Tua ciangin amau' mit in mi cimawhte' kisapna mu ding uh a, amau' bil in mi cimawhte' thugen ngai ding uh hi
Amaute lungtomin hi phangphang nawnlo ding uh a, deihsakna lungsim tawh a kitel takin thu gen hiathiat ding uh hi
Mihaite pen mi thupi kici nawnlo ding a, mi ginalote pen mi zahtakhuai kici nawnlo ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh mihai in haina thu gen a, a hoihin gamtat loh ding, Topa' thu a hoihlopi-in gen ding, a gilkialte' an duhna a phatlohna ding leh a dangtakte in tui dawn ding a neih theihlohna dingin, ama lungsim in mawhna bawl ding a sawm hi
Mi ginalo' ginatlohna siahuai mahmah hi. Zuauna kam tawh mizawngte a siasak ding leh mi cimawhte' thu a thuman ciang nangawnin a siasak dingin amah in gitloh nasepna a bawl hi
Ahih hangin mipi lungsim a nei mi in na a hoihte geel a, thuhoih nate-ah a pang hi.
Nuamtakin a om hithiat numeite aw, tho un la, ka aw za un. Nomau' tumtakin a lungkim tanute aw, ka thugenna na ngai un
Nomau' tumtakin a lungkim numeite aw, kum khat val zek khit ciangin na linglawng ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah kum hong sia ding a, singgah lawhna hun hong tunglo ding hi
Nuamtakin a om hithiat numeite aw, ling un. Nomau tumtakin a lungkimte aw, linglawng un. Na puan uh hawkkhia-in na tangguakun om un la na kawng uhah puanhampi teng un
A hoih mahmah lote leh tampi a gah leengguite a siatna, keima mite' leitangah ling leh lingkungte a pona, lungdamna khuapi sungah lungdamna a omna innte a siatna hangin dahin na dip uh hum un
Kumpi innte kinusia-in, mi tampi a omna kumpi khuapi kilawi ding hi. Mual leh tausangte zong kisiagawp ding a, late leh tuuhonte in gamtatna munin nei ding uh hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in ama kha hong puak ding hi. Leitang siate lei hoih suakkik ding a, lo-a ante hoih mahmahin tulak bang ding hi
Tua ciangin gamsung mun khempeuhah thutang om ding a, thu a manin kisem ding hi
Tua ciangin thumanna hangin nopna om ding a, thumanna hangin daihna leh lungmuan' tawntungna om ding hi
Ka mihingte pen kilem takin a ten'na, lungmuang takin a omna, daitakin a tawlngakna munah om ding uh hi
(Tua ciangin tulak kolhsiang ding a, a khuapi pen cimzan ding hi
Tui tampi a omna-ah khai tuh a, bawngtal leh late a ut utna-ah a tasak note pen mi nuamsa na hi uh hi.
